review_comment: A comment here describing _why_ we're using `0.025m` and `0.050m` -- in fact, I'm not sure I understand what these factors mean.
This factor is the maximum percentage of market volume that is tradeable. These values are ad-hoc defined by research.

maybe a note here saying that we're only adding the consolidator for the first config -- also, should there be preference of trades over quotes or vice versa? Right now we're just depending on whatever order the provider returns them in which (may) cause non-determinism later (perhaps)?
This might make a nice extension method -- I can see this being applicable in many places. I like it!
